meta.title: Verified graduate application windows
meta.disclaimer: A window may apply to an institution, a programme group, or one programme. Every published date must be verified against an official university page and scoped explicitly.

applications.evidence: The official course page lists applications opening on 3 September 2025 and the application deadline as 26 February 2026 for Michaelmas 2026.
Hanyang University's official 2026 Fall international graduate admission guide lists online applications from 10:00 on 4 March to 17:00 on 27 March 2026, Korea Standard Time.
The official course page lists applications opening on 3 September 2025 and the application deadline as 14 May 2026 for Michaelmas 2026.
ETH Zurich lists 1 to 30 November 2025 as the mandatory window for applicants with an international Bachelor's degree and for ESOP or Direct Doctorate applicants.
ETH Zurich lists 1 to 30 April 2026 as a second window only for applicants with a Bachelor's degree from a Swiss university.
The official UCL programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 26 June 2026, closing at 5pm UK time.
The official UCL programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026, closing at 5pm UK time.
The official UCL Computer Science MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Computer Science MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Data Science MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Data Science MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Machine Learning MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Machine Learning MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Robotics and Artificial Intelligence MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Robotics and Artificial Intelligence MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Software Systems Engineering MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Software Systems Engineering MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Computer Graphics, Vision and Imaging MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Computer Graphics, Vision and Imaging MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Data Science and Machine Learning MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 27 March 2026.
The official UCL Data Science and Machine Learning MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Scientific and Data Intensive Computing MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 26 June 2026.
The official UCL Scientific and Data Intensive Computing MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.
The official UCL Medical Robotics and Artificial Intelligence MSc programme page states that applications for applicants requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 26 June 2026.
The official UCL Medical Robotics and Artificial Intelligence MSc programme page states that applications for applicants not requiring a visa are accepted from 20 October 2025 to 28 August 2026.

NTU's official coursework admissions page lists the Master of Computing in Applied Artificial Intelligence for the August 2026 intake and states that applications open on 1 November and close on 31 March.

PKU's official 2026 international graduate admissions notice states that the online application is open from 20 October 2025 to 23 December 2025. English-taught master's programmes may use separate deadlines.
Penn Engineering's official application guide states that master's applications for Fall 2026 are open from 15 September 2025 until 1 February 2026.
The official Advanced Computing application page states that the second round runs from 1 January 2026 at 08:00 to 27 February 2026 at 17:00 Beijing time.
Fudan's official 2026 English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure states that Phase One runs from 13 October to 12 December 2025.
Fudan's official 2026 English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure states that Phase Two runs from 1 March to 31 March 2026.
CUHK Graduate School states that applications commenced on 1 September 2025 at 09:00 Hong Kong time and lists 31 January 2026 as the MSc in Computer Science deadline.

The official IST admissions page states that AY2027 summer entrance-examination applications were accepted from 29 May until 14:00 JST on 4 June 2026. The Computer Science guide confirms that master's applications use the summer examination only.
SNU's official Spring 2027 international graduate admissions guide states that online applications and scanned documents are accepted from 10:00 KST on 6 July to 17:00 KST on 9 July 2026.
IP Paris's official admissions page states that the first 2026/27 master's application session through the IP Paris portal ran from 29 October 2025 to 8 January 2026.
IP Paris's official admissions page states that the second 2026/27 master's application session through the IP Paris portal ran from 9 January to 26 March 2026.
Yonsei Graduate School's official Fall 2026 international-student schedule states that applications were accepted from 10:00 on 6 April to 17:00 on 13 April 2026.
CMU School of Computer Science states that Fall 2027 applications open on 9 September 2026 and that the final deadline for its general graduate programmes is 9 December 2026 at 3 p.m. Eastern time.

PolyU's official taught-postgraduate listing gives 2 July 2025 as the September 2026 application start and the MSc in Information Technology programme gives 30 April 2026 as its extended-round deadline.
Kyoto University's Graduate School of Informatics April 2027 master's guide states that postal application materials are accepted from 5 June to 19 June 2026 and must arrive by 5:00 p.m.
Universiti Malaya's official application calendar lists 9 February to 30 August 2026 for Malaysian and international postgraduate coursework and mixed-mode applications for the October 2026 intake.
Korea University Graduate School's official Fall 2026 schedule states that online applications ran from 10:00 on 3 March to 17:00 on 13 March 2026.
NTU's official international degree admissions page states that the first September 2026 round ran from 11:00 on 1 October to 16:00 on 13 November 2025.
NTU's official international degree admissions page states that the second September 2026 round ran from 11:00 on 1 December 2025 to 16:00 on 15 January 2026.
UCSD CSE's official graduate admissions page states that the Fall 2026 application opened on 3 September 2025 and ran until the extended deadline of 23 December 2025 at 5:00 p.m. PST.
Brown CS states on its master's application page that Fall 2026 applications were accepted from 1 September 2025 until the application deadline of 23 January 2026.
KTH's official MSc Computer Science page states that applications for studies starting in August 2027 open on 16 October 2026 and close on 15 January 2027.
Glasgow's official Computing Science MSc page lists international and EU round 1 from 1 October to 5 November 2025.
Glasgow's official Computing Science MSc page lists international and EU round 2 from 6 November to 17 December 2025.
Glasgow's official Computing Science MSc page lists international and EU round 3 from 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026.
Glasgow's official Computing Science MSc page lists international and EU round 4 from 5 February to 25 March 2026.
Glasgow's official Computing Science MSc page lists international and EU round 5 from 26 March to 13 May 2026.
Glasgow's official Computing Science MSc page lists international and EU round 6 from 14 May to 8 July 2026.
The official UBA data mining master's admissions page states that registration for new entrants ran from 6 August to 11 August 2025 for the 2026 academic cycle.
Science Tokyo's official IGP(C) Fall 2026 call states that the application period ran from 14 January 2026 to 5 April 2026, with the application deadline on 5 April 2026.

applications.round: Special Selection in Summer for International Applicants
applications.evidence: The official Osaka IST April 2027 master course application guide for Special Selection in Summer for International Applicants states the main application acceptance period is 22 June 2026 to 26 June 2026.
UTS official application dates page states that domestic postgraduate Autumn 2027 applications open on 28 July 2026 and close on 31 January 2027.
POSTECH's official graduate admissions homepage states that the 2026-27 general admission first-round application period ran from 24 February 2026 to 3 April 2026 at 18:00.
Qatar University's official Fall 2026 graduate application timeline states that graduate online admission opened on 1 December 2025 and closed on 25 February 2026.

Aalto's official Computer Science master's page lists the application period as 1 December 2025 to 2 January 2026, matching the central master's admissions schedule for studies beginning in autumn 2026.
The University of Helsinki official Computer Science master's page states that the application period begins on 5 January 2027 at 08:00 and ends on 19 January 2027 at 15:00.
Université de Montréal's official Maîtrise en informatique page lists Hiver 2027 applications as open from 1 February 2026 to 1 September 2026.
IIT Madras M.Tech and M.A. Admissions 2026 states that the online application portal opened on 28 March 2026 and closed on 28 April 2026 at 11:59 PM.

applications.round: 3rd Round Graduate School Application for International Students
applications.evidence: SKKU Global Admissions states that the Fall 2026 3rd Round Graduate School Application for International Students runs from 22 June 2026 at 10 AM to 1 July 2026 at 5 PM KST.
